Saint Paul was an early figure in [[Christianity]] and the founder and [[Patient Zero]] of [[Pauline Christianity]].

He had an internal conflict over his job as a tax collector where he got an idea of Justice, vs his Christian conversion. He created an ideology of Justice vs Mercy which is a major [[Hydroplane]]. He suffered heavily from [[Angst]].<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jbwm03djuJc&list=PLND1JCRq8Vuh3f0P5qjrSdb5eC1ZfZwWJ&index=16</ref>

== References ==
[[Category:Patient Zeros]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Saint Paul]][[Category:Christianity]]
[[Category:Angst]]
[[Category:Pages]]
